Based on the provided context, the commentator and author who questioned the validity of the Center for Organizational Research and Education (CORE)'s non-profit status is **Rachel Maddow**.

The text states that "commentators from Rachel Maddow to Michael Pollan have treated the group as an entity that specializes in astroturfing," following the mention that experts questioned the validity of the group's non-profit status. Additionally, the first paragraph identifies Rachel Maddow explicitly as an "American television host, political commentator, and author."
